title: GitHub PRs
command: gh pr list --json number,title,state,isDraft --jq '[.[] | {icon: "●", iconColor: (if .isDraft then "#cc8822" elif .state == "OPEN" then "#22cc22" elif .state == "MERGED" then "#8855cc" else "#cc3322" end), title: ((.number|tostring) + " " + .title), action: {shell: ("gh pr view " + (.number|tostring) + " --web")}}]'
